request_text: Show customers the current status of their orders on a tracking page
rationale: Clause 2.1 covers order status tracking directly.

request_text: Shoppers should be able to narrow the catalog by product category
rationale: Paraphrase of Clause 2.3 category filtering ('narrow the catalog by category').

request_text: Improve product search so partial words still find matching products
rationale: Clause 2.3 includes product search; improving match quality is a modification of an in-scope feature. Single close analog in history (NW-301 product search and filtering, 6h) — a real enhancement costs somewhat more than the original build, so a defensible estimate must be a range around the analog, not its point value.
Clause 6.1 explicitly excludes cryptocurrency payments (Bitcoin etc.).

request_text: Let customers pay with Bitcoin or Ethereum wallets
rationale: Clause 6.1 crypto exclusion phrased through two brand names; the multi-brand phrasing must still register as a strong exclusion match.

request_text: Onboard outside marketplace sellers so their goods appear in our catalog
rationale: Reads like Clause 2.3 catalog work but is third-party marketplace seller integration, excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: Add a loyalty points program with tiered rewards
rationale: No clause covers loyalty/rewards; not excluded either — new capability → CR.

request_text: Customers want product reviews with star ratings and photos
rationale: Reviews/ratings are not covered by any clause and not excluded — new capability → CR.

request_text: Support 5 payment providers in total instead of the current setup
rationale: Clause 2.2 supports integration with at most 3 payment providers; 5 exceeds the contractual limit → CR (the payment effort pool is also already spent, which independently routes to CR).

request_text: Overhaul the whole payment flow: automatic retries, 3-D Secure, saved cards and refunds automation
rationale: Payments sit under the Clause 2.2 effort pool (30h) which past payment work (~37h) has already exhausted; a flow-wide overhaul cannot fit the pool → CR.

request_text: Ürün arama sayfasındaki hata için düzeltme sağlanacaktır
rationale: Turkish request against the English contract: a bug fix in in-scope product search (Clause 2.3) → Clause 7.1 bug-fix maintenance. The boilerplate verb 'sağlanacaktır' must not distort the maintenance routing.

request_text: Magaza sitesi daha hizli acilsin ve modern gorunsun
rationale: Vague performance/UX wish with no concrete clause to anchor to → gray area, PMO escalation. Typed WITHOUT Turkish diacritics (magaza/hizli/acilsin/gorunsun) — ASCII spelling must not change the routing.
